message.content:
You are implementing the frontend for a Laravel + Inertia.js + React booking engine project. The project is at:
`/Users/byrondevin/Desktop/Technical Take-Home Assessment (Intermediate Full-Stack Software Engineer - LekkeSlaap)/booking-engine`

Read the implementation plan at `implementation-plan.md` sections 4.1 through 4.13 for full details. Here's what to build:

## Important context
- Uses React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS v4 + shadcn/ui (Radix Nova)
- Inertia.js bridges Laravel to React (use `@inertiajs/react` for routing/forms)
- shadcn/ui components are at `resources/js/Components/ui/` (capital C Components)
- `cn()` utility at `resources/js/lib/utils.ts`
- Zustand for state, React Hook Form + Zod for form validation
- Brand colors: primary is orange (#EC772D) via CSS vars, also `brand-orange` and `brand-gray` in Tailwind theme
- NEVER use em dashes in text - use regular dashes or commas
- Use `@/` path alias for imports (maps to `resources/js/`)
- The existing Breeze pages use capital-case directories: Components, Pages, Layouts

## Property Data Structure (from property.json):
```json
{
  "property": { "id": 101, "name": "Lekke Localhost Lodge", "currency": "ZAR", "tax_rate": 0.15, "pictures": [...] },
  "units": [
    { "id": 1, "name": "Standard Room", "max_guests": 2, "pricing_model": "per_unit", "price": 1200.00, "available_count": 5, "pictures": [...] },
    { "id": 2, "name": "Deluxe Suite", "max_guests": 4, "pricing_model": "per_unit", "price": 2500.00, "available_count": 2, "pictures": [...] },
    { "id": 3, "name": "Family Cottage", "max_guests": 6, "pricing_model": "per_person", "price": 650.00, "available_count": 1, "pictures": [...] },
    { "id": 4, "name": "Backpacker Bunk", "max_guests": 1, "pricing_model": "per_person", "price": 250.00, "available_count": 8, "pictures": [...] }
  ]
}
```

## Tasks (implement ALL of these):

### 4.1 TypeScript Types
Create `resources/js/types/property.ts`:
- Unit, Property, PropertyData interfaces

Create `resources/js/types/booking.ts`:
- BookingStatus type, BookingStatusResponse interface

### 4.2 Zustand Store
Create `resources/js/Stores/useBookingStore.ts`:
- State: currentStep (1-5), checkIn/checkOut (string|null), rooms (RoomSelection[]), specialRequests, bookingId
- Actions: setDates, setRooms, setSpecialRequests, setBookingId, nextStep, prevStep, goToStep, reset
- Use persist middleware with localStorage key 'booking-wizard'

### 4.3 Zod Schemas
Create schemas at `resources/js/lib/schemas/`:
- dateSchema.ts: validates checkIn >= today, checkOut > checkIn
- roomSchema.ts: validates rooms array with guest limits per unit
- bookingSchema.ts: combines date + rooms + specialRequests
- index.ts barrel export

### 4.4 Shared Utils
Create at `resources/js/lib/utils/`:
- formatCurrency.ts: uses Intl.NumberFormat('en-ZA', { style: 'currency', currency: 'ZAR' })
- calculatePrice.ts: PriceBreakdown type, calculatePrice function (per_unit: price*nights*quantity, per_person: price*guests*nights*quantity)
- calculateNights helper

### 4.5 BookingWizard (Orchestrator)
Create `resources/js/Components/Booking/BookingWizard.tsx`:
- Props: propertyData, auth
- Reads currentStep from Zustand
- Step indicator/progress bar with aria attributes
- Conditionally renders DateStep(1), RoomStep(2), SummaryStep(3), StatusStep(5) - note: step 4 is skipped (submission happens from step 3)
- Back/Next navigation buttons
- Focus management on step change

### 4.6 Step 1: DateStep
Create `resources/js/Components/Booking/DateStep.tsx`:
- React Hook Form with zodResolver(dateSchema)
- Two date pickers using shadcn Popover + Calendar
- Check-in disables before today, check-out disables before checkIn+1
- Shows calculated nights
- On submit: setDates + nextStep

### 4.7 Step 2: RoomStep
Create `resources/js/Components/Booking/RoomStep.tsx`:
- Room cards with image, name, description, price, availability
- Quantity selector (0 to available_count) per room
- Guest count input (shown when quantity > 0)
- Real-time per-room line total
- Running total at bottom with tax
- Validates at least one room selected

### 4.8 Step 3: SummaryStep
Create `resources/js/Components/Booking/SummaryStep.tsx`:
- Displays dates, rooms, price breakdown
- VAT tooltip on total: "Includes 15% VAT (R X,XXX.XX)"
- Special requests textarea (max 500 chars)
- If NOT authenticated: show alert with login/register links
- If authenticated: show "Confirm Booking" button
- On confirm: POST to /bookings via Inertia router with checkIn, checkOut, rooms, specialRequests, submitted_total
- Handle 422 and 500 errors

### 4.9 Step 5: StatusStep
Create `resources/js/Components/Booking/StatusStep.tsx`:
- Polls GET /api/bookings/{id}/status every 2.5s
- Pending: spinner + "Processing your booking..."
- Confirmed: checkmark + confirmation ID + summary
- Failed: error + "Try Again" button (goes to step 3)
- Stops polling on confirmed/failed
- 60s timeout safeguard

### 4.10 Custom Polling Hook
Create `resources/js/hooks/useBookingStatus.ts`:
- useBookingStatus(bookingId) returns { status, confirmationId, isPolling }

### 4.11 Booking Page (Inertia)
Create `resources/js/Pages/Booking/Index.tsx`:
- Receives propertyData and auth as Inertia page props
- Property header with name and hero image
- Renders BookingWizard
- Head title "Book - Lekke Localhost Lodge"

### 4.12 Layout & Styling
- Room cards: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2
- Touch targets min 44x44px
- Responsive design

### 4.13 Auth Integration
- Access auth via usePage().props.auth.user
- Login/register links use Inertia Link to Breeze auth pages
- Zustand persist survives navigation

## Existing Inertia types
Check `resources/js/types/index.d.ts` for the existing PageProps type that Breeze sets up. You'll need to extend or work with it.

## Code style
- Strict TypeScript, no `any`
- Use Zod schemas as source of truth for types (z.infer)
- Functional components only
- cn() for class composition
- Comments only where they add value
- No em dashes in any text output

IMPORTANT: Implement ALL files listed above. This is the complete frontend implementation.
